title: Canopy Growth's Earnings Call: Mixed Sentiments and Strategic Moves
text: Canopy Growth's recent earnings call revealed mixed sentiments and strategic moves. Management discussed margin pressures in cannabis and Storz & Bickel divisions with gross margins down approximately 3 basis points year-over-year. Adjusted EBITDA remains negative at approximately $3 million. Free cash flow continues to be negative at $19 million outflow. Policy and tariff headwinds present near-term challenges including veterans reimbursement reduction and potential tariff impacts. Management highlighted cost-saving initiatives and strategic acquisitions to strengthen market position. International expansion continues with focus on European markets. Medical cannabis segment showing strong momentum with record quarters in Canada.
